title: MotorsOn Property, Spel Class
description: Turns motor power on or off for the current robot.
see_also:
PowerHigh

SFree

SLock

MotorsOn Property Example

VB Example:

If Not m_spel.MotorsOn Then

   m_spel.MotorsOn = True

End If

C# Example:

if (!m_spel.MotorsOn)

   m_spel.MotorsOn = true;
examples:
If Not m_spel.MotorsOn Then
   m_spel.MotorsOn = True
End If
